items.name: Mini Christmas Tree – Right Shoulder Companion
items.description:
Add festive charm to your avatar with the Mini Christmas Tree – Right Shoulder Companion 🎄✨
This adorable mini tree sits comfortably on your right shoulder, decorated with holiday ornaments and a bright star topper. Perfect for Christmas outfits, winter roleplay, and seasonal events. Pair it with the left shoulder version for a complete festive look!

items.name: Mr. Turtle Plush
items.description:
Looks like another stowaway from The Two Brother's Buffet. This one looks... older however. Very old. He's often forgotten, his younger brother takes all the spotlight, but Mr. Turtle doesn't care. He had his time in the spotlight already. He doesn't mind sharing. Spending time with you is far more fun, he says.

Game and Model by: BBTinc24
Asset made by: WearWQLF
